'''Making a Full Recovery''' was a web supplement by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. Written to follow on from ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'', it provided RPG stats for the events of the [[eBook]] ''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]''.

==Publisher's summary==
Amid the chaos and carnage that is [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] era, Recovery follows the exploits of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the seriously injured [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] as they avoid [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and make their way back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to face off against the anti-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] contingent within the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. During the course of their adventures, Han, Leia, and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] encounter danger in the [[Coronet Hospital|Coronet Medcenter]], aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and in the skies above Coruscant.
